landing.hero_subtitle: AI-powered matching across Child Care, Human Care & Pet Care — verified, scored, and explained.
landing.categories_sub: One person, one category. Every profile is Verified and medically screened.
landing.child_desc: ADHD, autism, special-needs support, infant & toddler care

landing.pet_desc: Breed-specific handlers, anxiety disorders, dietary needs

landing.step4_desc: Every match includes verified badges and points to look after

search.title: Find Your Perfect Match
search.subtitle: Describe what you need — our AI engine will find and score the best caregiver for you.
search.placeholder: e.g. Need a babysitter for my 6-year-old tonight, she has ADHD, budget is Rs.500, Banjara Hills
